title: Limbones Server Modpack
description: A personalized Cobblemon experience with extra mods for adventure, building, and multiplayer fun! Catch, evolve, and survive in minecraft with friends on the Limbones community server.
body:
# **DOWNLOAD THE LATEST NEOFORGE VERSION TO JOIN US ON THE SERVER**

Modpack created by Limbones, tested and enjoyed by my mods and you, the audience. This is for my audience and friends.

This modpack mixes many different mods with the world of Pokémon-inspired Cobblemon, custom progression, and multiplayer features designed just for our community server.

Discover unique Pokémon companions that can help you thrive in the sky!

🎮 Features:

🧱 Minecraft with Cobblemon integration and many more

⚙️ Lightweight optimization for smooth multiplayer play

🤝 Built for the Limbones Community Server — join us and play together!

🔗 Join the adventure:
YouTube → https://youtube.com/@limboz
